title: MORNING REVIEW — 2026-07-10
html:
MORNING REVIEW — 2026-07-10

Prepared: 2026-07-10 · Seat: REPORTER (charter .claude/agents/reporter.md v1) What this is: this session's decision-class work, distilled for you in plain English and ordered decision-first. Four sections: (1) what the platform can do today it couldn't this morning, (2) the handful of calls only you can make, (3) what the org already executed and verified on your behalf, and (4) what to keep an eye on. Every number cites the commit or delta that backs it; nothing here is evidence in itself — the delta chain is the source of truth. Tags: LANDED = measured and live · PENDING = ready, awaiting your word · ASPIRATIONAL = roadmap.

1. BREAKTHROUGHS — new since this morning

  • Tonight's game reports won't silently go missing anymore. The board used to keep showing

    • yesterday's games and could quietly skip a report; the daily rollover and a report-pairing fix now guarantee tonight's three games appear, and the leftover-file bug that mixed up which PDF belonged to which game is closed. LANDED. — commits 2de7fb8, 32665d5

  • Tonight's slate is confirmed correct on the live public board. The three matchups were checked

    • against the outside schedule before publishing, and the 5:15 PM report drop is unblocked and passing its checks (a stray internal word that was jamming the publish step was removed). LANDED. — commits 48706d1, 32665d5

  • The background watcher that keeps the platform running can no longer spiral out of control. A

    • flaw made it repeatedly kill and re-launch itself; that whole failure class is now closed — the code was rolled back to a known-good version and passed a real 10-minute live watch. LANDED. — commits a879e97, 5e0a6f3

  • Every game now knows the date it was actually played and where it was played. A one-time

    • correction filled in the true local game dates, and the platform now records each game's venue going forward — both independently double-checked. This is the foundation that stops the "we projected a game that already happened" mistake for good. LANDED. — commits aeabb33, 9ba93f4

  • The platform now watches team news on its own. A roster-and-injury news collector is running

    • live (49 items pulled), which is how tonight's Rivers ankle situation surfaced in time. LANDED. — commit 30c426d

2. STRATEGIC QUESTIONS — only you can decide these (spend / accounts / new public surface)

A) The big one — where our betting edge can and can't come from. We finished a careful study of where our number beats the market and where it doesn't. Plain result: our game-margin prediction is already efficiently priced by the betting market — once the closing line is known, our margin number adds essentially no new information, and there is no profitable side-betting edge in it. This is not a statement that the platform is "capped" — the market lives under the exact same game-to-game luck we do. It's a direction-setting finding: the reducible work left on margin is calibration (making our uncertainty ranges honest), not beating the line. If real edge exists, it has to come from elsewhere — player props, game totals, per-situation factors, or beating the closing line over time (which we can't yet measure without capturing our own posted-number timestamps). This is a strategy input for you, not a request — it tells us where to point the next month of work. — commits d7de5ff (E1), 255e2fc (E2)

B) Rotate the Discord bot token. Tonight's automated Discord delivery is blocked by an authentication rejection; delivery is falling back to the board plus phone alert, so nothing is missed, but restoring Discord needs you to mint/rotate the bot token (an account action). PENDING — Class-C. — ops/lane_claims.json tonight-chain

C) Deploy the new visible watcher face — your timing. A cleaner, always-visible status face for the background watcher is built and tested, waiting on a branch. Going live needs an elevated re-register and retiring the interim console — non-urgent, your call on when. PENDING — Class-C, coordinated. — ops/lane_claims.json deploy_held (branch 7692301)

3. EXECUTED BY DIRECTOR — done and verified on your behalf (Class-B ledger)

Already live and independently verified:

  • Game-date correction — one-time backfill of true local game dates; independently re-derived and

    • confirmed, fully reversible if ever needed. LANDED, verified. — commit aeabb33

  • Venue capture — the platform now stores each game's venue; passed all five verification checks

    • with zero discrepancies. LANDED, verified. — commit 9ba93f4

  • Watcher rollback + storm guards — reverted to the last known-good watcher and added guard rails;

    • passed a real 10-minute live watch. Rollback in hand (the prior guarded build). LANDED, verified. — commits 5e0a6f3, a879e97

  • Board + report fixes — daily rollover, report-pairing gate, PDF file-leak fix, and the publish

    • unblock for tonight's 5:15 drop. LANDED. — commits 2de7fb8, 32665d5, 48706d1

  • Tempo scouting report — tonight's Dallas-at-Toronto tempo report, checked against ESPN before

    • publishing; verified alongside two other lanes (3 of 3 passed). LANDED, verified. — commits b91d53d, 7696757

  • The never-idle operating rule — written into the platform's standing law so a session never sits

    • idle while work is queued. LANDED. — commit 63e48f9

Ready to execute next (Class-B, awaiting the queue — each says what it needs):

  • Honest-uncertainty recalibration for margins — the study found our margin number is slightly

    • mis-scaled (a fit slope near 0.48); correcting it is a calibration gain worth roughly 0.18 on average error, *not* a betting edge. Needs the live-board flip plus a rollback in hand before it ships. PENDING. — commit d7de5ff

  • Revisit the frozen rating blend — the trigger we set (wait for ~60 decided games) is now met at

    • 143 games; the frozen player-rating blend can be re-opened and re-measured. Needs the walk-forward re-fit run before any flip. PENDING. — commit d7de5ff, ops/lane_claims.json decision_recs

  • Capture our own posted-number timestamps — to ever measure whether we beat the closing line, we

    • need to record when we posted a number versus when the market closed. This is a new small data feed to build. PENDING. — ops/lane_claims.json decision_recs

4. WATCH ITEMS

  • Tonight's 5:15 PM delivery chain is armed and runs on the live coordinator. It fires the report

    • drop, per-game 15-minute reminders, and the corrected tempo report — including the Rivers ankle note for Connecticut, the Harrison and Allemand player-prop angles, and venue stated as fact (not projected). Discord is falling back to board plus phone alert until the token is rotated (item 2B). — commit a711255, ops/lane_claims.json tonight_chain

  • The new watcher face is built and waiting on your deploy timing (item 2C). Nothing breaks in the

    • meantime; the interim console keeps the watcher visible. — ops/lane_claims.json deploy_held

*Reporter charter compliance: read the session's claims file + key deltas/commits; wrote ONLY docs/reports/; no database writes; every claim cites a commit or delta; LANDED/PENDING tags on every capability; plain English throughout (no internal codes, no jargon on any human line); newest delta wins on conflict. Derived view — the delta chain is the only source of truth; do not cite this review as evidence.*
